title: create potyzhno
description: A modpack that combines realism, create and many more into a powerful modpack!
body:
# Create potyzhno

A modpack that combines **Automatisation**, **create** **optimisation** **realism** and many more to create a **Powerful** **modpack**

## Aims of this modpack

This modpack aims to create a stable structure of mods that add to the vanilla expirience to both modernise it, make it more fun and overall, just improve it

Explore a frely crafted world with new dungeons, decorations, and farming systems. Enjoy smoother visuals with optimization mods like Sodium and ImmediatelyFast, build high-tech contraptions with Create: Jetpack, and survive harsh conditions with Tough As Nails.

Whether you want to run massive factories, fight off mutant hordes, cook gourmet meals, or fly immersive aircrafts, this pack has a bit of everything — without losing the cozy creativity that makes Create so fun.

Perfect for builders, engineers, survivalists, and even PvE enjoyers who want a bit more punch to their world.

The modpack includes create and most of its popular addons, farmers delight and other realism mods like tough as nails to create a stable expirience for the players.
